who: small HR teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For small HR teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual tracking causes late filings. We automate payroll tax filings instead of manual tracking and filing of payroll taxes.
problem: Timely payroll tax filings and reminders
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small HR teams

Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
